title: Superior horror
description: a horror mod pack I made for me and my friend. feel free to try it out. bring some fresh underwear you might need it.
body: A horror modpack aimed at bringing you the best experiance without ruining minecraft core mechanics meaning no one trick pony monsters that one shot you without any counterplay. in addition there are some quality of life mods to make your game a little more cinematic and better. (compatible with anomaly mod if you crave more scares)
